ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Library) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Measured temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Measured humidity (in percentage) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the reading was taken */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the reading */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration in minutes since the previous reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration record associated with the reading */,
  "reading_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_readings_calibration_id FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_id") REFERENCES sensor_calibrations ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_readings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location the sensor is installed in */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "installation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the installation of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Value used to calibrate the sensor */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated reading */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high temperature, low humidity) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES environmental_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error record */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reading associated with the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_errors_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES environmental_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the energy consumption */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of energy consumption */,
  "energy_used_kwh" REAL /* Amount of energy used in kilowatt-hours */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Source of the energy consumption (e.g., electricity, gas, water) */,
  "energy_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the energy consumption (e.g., kWh, therms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, data_update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the user's activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that has this permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_readings, edit_settings) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
